title: Luffy Refuses to Stop
description: On pages 5–8, luffy refuses to stop as after Wapol blocks the way, Luffy keeps carrying his injured friends up the mountain despite the cold and attacks.
scene: Luffy Refuses to Stop. After Wapol blocks the way, Luffy keeps carrying his injured friends up the mountain despite the cold and attacks. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Did they give up already or something?

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Behold our battle camouflage, the Snow Look!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Seeing as how you've already sustained grave injuries, this should be an instant kill!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Don't be Ridi- culous! It's just a council- dance. A lapin never shows mercy towards humans.

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Thanks a bunch! You really saved us!

summary: This part centers on luffy refuses to stop, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
